title: Pepeland passport
description: A simple resource pack that changes a written book into a Pepeland passport cover
body:
![Pepeland passport](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fbca6a96bf7da173911c51260b18381bd60563af_0.webp)
### RU
Простой ресурс пак, который меняет написанную книгу на обложку паспорта [Pepeland](https://pepeland.net/)

### EN
A simple resource pack that changes a written book into a [Pepeland](https://pepeland.net/) passport cover
